Route receipts now gate on telemetry source, route, path, now_unix_ms start/end/elapsed timing, serve result, request bytes, wire bytes, and body bytes matching the socket trace. Stream receipts now gate on read cursor, ack cursor, replay cursor, total-after-cursor, window count, deferred count, ack status, and replay status matching the pressure receipt.
